scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:logs && pnpx shx rm -rf node_modules
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm test:e2e:basic && pnpm test:e2e:handlers && pnpm test:e2e:reducers && pnpm test:e2e:redux && pnpm test:e2e:custom
scripts.test:e2e:electron-zustand-basic: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=zustand-basic pnpm run exec
scripts.test:e2e:electron-zustand-handlers: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=zustand-handlers pnpm run exec
scripts.test:e2e:electron-zustand-reducers: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=zustand-reducers pnpm run exec
scripts.test:e2e:electron-redux: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=redux pnpm run exec
scripts.test:e2e:electron-custom: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=custom pnpm run exec
scripts.bench:electron: pnpm bench:electron-zustand-basic && pnpm bench:electron-redux && pnpm bench:electron-custom && tsx ../scripts/bench-aggregate.ts
scripts.bench:electron-zustand-basic: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=zustand-basic SPEC_FILE=bench-performance.spec.ts pnpm run exec
scripts.bench:electron-redux: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=redux SPEC_FILE=bench-performance.spec.ts pnpm run exec
scripts.bench:electron-custom: cross-env APP_DIR=electron/e2e MODE=custom SPEC_FILE=bench-performance.spec.ts pnpm run exec
